_meta.source: EMA scenario discussions; NCCS net-zero commentary; OWID + IEA cost benchmarks; pathway envelopes are editorial — see METHODOLOGY.md
_meta.units: feasibility caps in % of generation; LCOE in S$/MWh (indicative); land in ha per TWh; risk on a 1–5 scale
_meta.notes: Envelopes are design-locked anchors for the mixer. They are not forecasts. They are plausibility brackets drawn from public targets and published cost benchmarks. Conservative bias: caps tend to be optimistic-but-defensible.

pathways.label: Natural gas (incl. H2-ready CCGT)
pathways.notes: By 2032 there are at least 11 H2-ready CCGT plants. Beyond 2040, residual gas is hard to retire without import or storage backup.

pathways.label: Domestic solar PV
pathways.notes: Theoretical ceiling ~3% of demand under current land-use planning; offshore + reservoir + rooftop expansion edges that up. 3 GWp target by 2030.

pathways.label: Regional low-carbon imports (SGEI / LTMS+)
pathways.notes: 200 MW LTMS-PIP phase 2; target 6 GW low-carbon imports by 2035 (~30% of demand). SGEI established April 2025.

pathways.label: Hydrogen / ammonia firing
pathways.notes: Notional potential of up to 50% of power needs by 2050 per National Hydrogen Strategy 2022; currently not commercial.

pathways.label: Nuclear (SMR) + CCS + geothermal
pathways.notes: Three power-gencos appointed July 2025 for CCS feasibility; SMRs being monitored. Public-acceptance and siting are bottlenecks at least as large as engineering.
